memoryArtifacts.headline: John Mott
memoryArtifacts.description: John Mott was Admitted a freeman at Aquidneck, RI in 1638.  He may have immigrated after his son, Adam.  In 1639 John Mott's land is mentioned.  On 29 Aug 1644, 25 Jan 1648/9, 19 jan 1652, 2 june 1653 …

popularStory.headline: John Mott
popularStory.description: John Mott was Admitted a freeman at Aquidneck, RI in 1638.  He may have immigrated after his son, Adam.  In 1639 John Mott's land is mentioned.  On 29 Aug 1644, 25 Jan 1648/9, 19 jan 1652, 2 june 1653 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Mott II於1575年9月15日出生在英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登時，他的父親Mark Mott26歲，母親Frances Gutter19歲。他於1593年1月20日與Elizabeth Hollis在英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1638年住在美國羅得島。他去世於1656年7月3日之後在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德，埋葬在英國艾可沙爾福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Mott II于1575年9月15日出生在英国艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登时，他的父亲Mark Mott26岁，母亲Frances Gutter19岁。他于1593年1月20日与Elizabeth Hollis在英国艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1638年住在美国罗德岛州。他去世于1656年7月3日之后在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德，埋葬在英国艾可沙爾福德。

nameMeanings.name: Mott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English female personal name Motte, a pet form of Matilda. There has probably been some confusion with Moat .
German: topographic name for someone who lived by or owned property in a marshy area, from Middle High German mot ‘mud, swamp’.

variants.name: Motts
meanings: English (East Anglia): variant of Mott , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Moat
meanings: English: from Middle English mote ‘moat, protective ditch’ (Old French mote, motte ‘mound, embankment’). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived at or by a moat, or habitational, from one of many minor places so named in England and Scotland. There has probably been some confusion with Mott .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: Providence Founded
historicEvents.description: In 1636 Providence is founded as a settlement for Rhode Island by Roger Williams

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Mott II was born on 15 September 1575, in Saffron Walden, Essex, England, his father, Mark Mott, was 26 and his mother, Frances Gutter, was 19. He married Elizabeth Hollis on 20 January 1593, in Saffron Walden, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He lived in Rhode Island, United States in 1638. He died after 3 July 1656, in Rhode Island, British Colonial America, and was buried in Shalford, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Mott II est né le 15 septembre 1575, à Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Mark Mott, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Frances Gutter, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Hollis le 20 janvier 1593, à Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il a vécu à Rhode Island, États-Unis en 1638. Il est décédé après 3 juillet 1656, à Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterré à Shalford, Essex, Angleterre.

de.Saffron Walden, Essex, England: Saffron Walden, Essex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Mott II am 15. September 1575 in Saffron Walden, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Mark Mott 26 und seine Mutter Frances Gutter 19. Er hat am 20. Januar 1593 in Saffron Walden, Essex, England Elizabeth Hollis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1638 hat er in Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb nach 3. Juli 1656 in Rhode Island, British Colonial America und wurde in Shalford, Essex, England begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Hollis il 20 gennaio 1593, nel Saffron Walden, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1638. Morì dopo il 3 luglio 1656, nel Rhode Island, British Colonial America, e fu sepolto a Shalford, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Mott IIが1575年9月15日にイギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンで生まれた時，父Mark Mottは26歳，母Frances Gutterは19歳であった。1593年1月20日にイギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンでElizabeth Hollisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1638年にはアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州に住んでいた。彼は1656年7月3日以後にイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドで死去し，イギリスエセックスシャルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Mott II(이)가 1575년 9월 15일 영국 에세스 사프런 월든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mark Mott(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Frances Gutter(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1593년 1월 20일 영국 에세스 사프런 월든에서 Elizabeth Hollis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1638년도에 미국 로드아일랜드 주에서 살았다. 그는 1656년 7월 3일 이후 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드에서 사망했으며 영국 에세스 샤퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Mott II nasceu em 15 de setembro de 1575, em Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Mark Mott, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Frances Gutter, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Hollis em 20 de janeiro de 1593, em Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele viveu em Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América em 1638. Ele faleceu após 3 de julho de 1656, em Rhode Island, British Colonial America, e foi sepultado em Shalford, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Mott II родился 15 сентября 1575 г. в местности саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Mark Mott было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Frances Gutter, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Hollis 20 января 1593 г. в местности саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты в 1638 году. Он умер после 3 июля 1656 г. в местности род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика и был похоронен в местности шэлфорд, эссекс, Англия.

Se casó con Elizabeth Hollis el 20 de enero de 1593, en Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Rhode Island, Estados Unidos en 1638. Murió después de 3 de julio de 1656, en Rhode Island, British Colonial America, y fue sepultado en Shalford, Essex, Inglaterra.
